title: Magnetic Building Figures with Transparent Whiteboard - 15PCS STEM Toy Set for Kids, Colorful Interlocking People Blocks & Erasable Board for Creative Play
features: 2-in-1 Magnetic Fun:​​ Transparent whiteboard (9.8"x7.8") with pink frame works as a building base + erasable canvas. Mount on walls or lay flat for play!
Snap & Spin Magnetic Design:​​ 15 colorful figures (red/yellow/green/blue) with swivel joints and arc rods build rotating circles, letters, or 3D structures without collapsing.
Learn Colors Through Play:​​ Combine translucent magnetic rods over the clear base to discover color blending effects – sparks artistic curiosity!
STEM Skills Development:​​ Teaches magnetism, symmetry, and simple engineering through hands-on experiments. Ideal for homeschool or classroom.
Safe & Durable:​​ Rounded edges, non-toxic ABS plastic, and CPC-certified. Washable surfaces for hassle-free cleanup.
description: Where Magnetism Meets Imagination!​​ This innovative set lets kids explore science and art simultaneously. Assemble the magnetic figures into dynamic sculptures on the sleek whiteboard, or doodle stories around them with the included dry-erase marker! ​​Why Kids & Parents Love It:​​ ​​Dual Play Modes​​ Build Mode: Connect figures into spinning gears, bridges, or animals. Learn Mode: Write/draw on the board and use figures as magnetic bookmarks. ​​Multi-Scenario Use​​ Home Play: Family challenges to build the tallest magnetic tower. Classroom Tool: Teachers demonstrate magnetic poles and color theory. Travel Essential: Compact size fits in backpacks for road trips. ​​Package Includes:​​ 15 Magnetic Figures (10 colors) 1 Transparent Whiteboard with Pink Frame (9.8"x7.8")
